name: dnr-business
description: Generate a WAME 'Detailný návrh riešenia' (DNR) — the binding pre-development project document — as a branded .docx. Accepts a folder, file(s), or free-form description as input; if invoked inside an existing project repository, deep-analyses modules/architecture for richer context. Outputs a client-language (sk/cs/en) Word document in WAME visual identity (green #20E87A, navy #091145, Inter font), with mandatory sections (Východiskový stav, Ciele, Popis riešenia, Technické riešenie, Fázy, Riziká, Podmienky).
